## Source Record

- Source URL: `https://nextjs.org/docs`
- Fetch method: `webfetch` in markdown mode
- Capture date: `2026-04-14`

## Why It Matters

The repo's docs app runs on Next.js, and this page is the authoritative entry point for framework structure, routing, metadata, MDX, config, deployment, and testing. It is the broadest upstream index for the runtime and file conventions that Fumadocs builds on.

## Key Excerpts

> "Using App Router"

> "Latest Version 16.2.3"

> The docs index prominently links App Router guides for `MDX`, `Metadata and OG images`, `Route Handlers`, `Testing`, and `next.config.js` configuration.

> The index also exposes file-convention docs for `layout.js`, `page.js`, `loading.js`, `not-found.js`, `route.js`, metadata files, and `mdx-components.js`.

## Capture Notes

- The fetched result is a very large navigation index rather than a narrative page.
- The useful signal is the scope of first-party docs areas available to the docs app: routing, rendering, metadata, MDX, config, and testing.
- Version `16.2.3` was surfaced in the captured index at fetch time.
